query: SELECT question, answer, COUNT(*) as count FROM flashcards GROUP BY question, answer HAVING count > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ogs2UohtmxebP6.root --database ijHg8DNNEmRjrxapNo7pAg --execute SELECT question, answer, COUNT(*) as count FROM flashcards GROUP BY question, answer HAVING count > 1;
